source_pr.title: plan: fix bug about processing property of reader plan.
source_pr.body:
Currently, we will construct wrong plan due to the wrong process for sort property columns of Reader plans.
PTAL @shenli @hanfei1991 @lamxTyler

symptoms: sql: "select * from t use index(b) where b = 1 order by a", (plan/cbo_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select * from t use index(b) where b = 1 order by a", (plan/cbo_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql: "select * from t use index(b) where b = 1 order by a", (plan/cbo_test.go)

analysis:

Changed files (3): plan/cbo_test.go, plan/new_physical_plan_builder.go, plan/task.go
